projectDescription: An HTML-first static site generator and optional full-stack framework that compiles .html templates to static output while preserving a native web-platform feel.
keyFeatures: HTML-first template engine with { } expressions, no JSX required
Single-file components and layouts with <slot> support
Build-time scripts (<script is:build>) stripped from output
Content collections with getCollection() and render() for Markdown
Optional Nitro server for API routes and full-stack deployment
Zero-runtime static HTML output — deploy anywhere
Hot module replacement (HMR) in dev for HTML, CSS, scripts, and content
TypeScript support with path aliases and aero check --types for CI
publicApiSurface: Aero.props — read component props in build scripts
render(doc) — lazy Markdown to HTML, from aero:content
getStaticPaths() — exported from dynamic page build scripts
for / data-for directive — loop over arrays in templates
if / else-if / else directives — conditionals in templates
switch / case / default directives — switch conditionals in templates
props / data-props attribute — pass data to components and scripts
aero check --types — TypeScript type checking for build scripts
aero build --incremental — faster repeat production builds
AERO_INCREMENTAL env var — enable incremental static builds
